(404/MAS) PARTIES IN PRO PER. STIP FOR PRO TEM SIGNED. PARTIES SWORN AND TESTIFIED. PET LIVES IN SAN JOAQUIN COUNTY (IN STOCKTON) AND RESP LIVES IN ATLANTA, GEORGIA. CO
URT INFORMS PET THAT HE HAS RIGHT TO ASK THAT C/S ISSUE BE MOVED TO SAN JOAQUIN AND RESP HAS RIGHT TO REGISTER C/C ISSUE IN HER COUNTY TO DEAL WITH
T'S 8 WEEKS SUMMER C/V WITH CHILDREN BE DENIED. CURRENT ORDERS SHALL REMAIN IN EFFECT. COURT REQUIRES PET TO REGISTER CHILDREN FOR SUMMER SCHOOL IN
IOR COURT ORDER, RESP SHOULD GET 2 WEEKS OF SUMMER C/V WITH CHILDREN. IF SUMMER SCHOOL HERE BEGINS BEFORE RESP GETS C/V, THEN CHILDREN SHALL BE WITH
RESP 2 WEEKS BEFORE SCHOOL BEGINS IN ATLANTA. PER COURT, NO NEED FOR ORDER TODAY. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY MARY ELLEN SCHERER #5208EN SHALL BE WITH
